human_actions_pending.context: 3 Dependabot PRs held open with review-flag comments

decisions.decision: CI uses compile-only gate, no APK signing
decisions.rationale: AGP 8.7.3 validateSigningDebug throws BouncyCastle EdEC NoClassDefFoundError on GitHub runners; unreproducible locally under any condition. Signed APKs build fine locally.
Build toolchain + compileSdk-36-gated deps are tightly version-locked; grouped PR perpetually failed on whichever blocked dep it bundled. Individual PRs let safe leaf updates flow.
CI couldn't bootstrap the sha256-pinned distribution; committing the wrapper is standard practice and makes CI reproducible.

decisions.decision: Kept both remotes (Forgejo origin + GitHub), dual-push
decisions.rationale: User wants GitHub CI/Dependabot while keeping the self-hosted Forgejo mirror.

next_action: Run /gsd-new-milestone to scope the next cycle (likely AGP-9/DEPS-17 — first verify Hilt now supports AGP 9), OR review the 3 held Dependabot major PRs.
context_notes: v1.0 fully shipped, organized, on GitHub with green CI + Dependabot. Repo clean at 5117160, all remotes synced. Nothing in-flight or broken. The trailing commits are dependabot.yml-only config tuning. GitHub auth gotcha: SSH on this host authenticates as VibingForFreedom (no workflow scope) — pushes to kawaii-not-kawaii use HTTPS + gh credential helper (already configured via gh auth setup-git).
